title: Grand Army (disambiguation)
content:
Grand Army can refer to two distinct armies:

*[[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Gungan Grand Army]], the combined military forces of the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] people.
*[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], the force of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] formed by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Disambig}}
